target.title: Add session workspace file preview editing
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The web UI session workspace rail could list some files, but users could not act on them directly. Text files needed a lightweight edit/save path, images needed an inline viewer, and unsupported files needed a clear metadata-only state instead of behaving like broken previews.

AI-assisted: yes, implemented with Codex.

## Why This Change Was Made

- Adds session workspace file metadata and content contracts for list/get/set.
- Adds gateway handlers and scopes for browsing, reading, and saving session workspace files.
- Adds web UI file actions for text edit/save, image preview, unsupported metadata, and browser entries.
- Keeps Swift protocol generation source-compatible for the new optional file-entry fields.
- Guards async save completion against mutating the wrong active session after navigation.

## User Impact

Users can open session workspace files from the left rail, make light edits to text/markdown files, save them back through the gateway, preview generated images inline, and see unsupported files as explicit metadata-only entries.

## Evidence

### Visual Proof

![Session workspace file click/edit flow](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Solvely-Colin/pr-proof-assets/main/openclaw/session-workspace-file-edit/session-workspace-file-click-edit-proof.gif)

![Session workspace file proof contact sheet](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Solvely-Colin/pr-proof-assets/main/openclaw/session-workspace-file-edit/contact-sheet.jpg)

![Workspace rail expanded](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Solvely-Colin/pr-proof-assets/main/openclaw/session-workspace-file-edit/01-workspace-rail-expanded.png)

![Text editor open](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Solvely-Colin/pr-proof-assets/main/openclaw/session-workspace-file-edit/02-text-editor-open.png)

![Text editor unsaved](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Solvely-Colin/pr-proof-assets/main/openclaw/session-workspace-file-edit/03-text-editor-unsaved.png)

![Text editor saved](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Solvely-Colin/pr-proof-assets/main/openclaw/session-workspace-file-edit/04-text-editor-saved.png)

![Image viewer with OpenClaw lobster image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Solvely-Colin/pr-proof-assets/main/openclaw/session-workspace-file-edit/05-image-viewer-openclaw-lobster.png)

![Unsupported file metadata view](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Solvely-Colin/pr-proof-assets/main/openclaw/session-workspace-file-edit/06-unsupported-file.png)

### Commands

- `pnpm protocol:gen:swift`
- `swift build` in `apps/shared/OpenClawKit`
- `pnpm format:check ui/src/ui/app-render.ts ui/src/ui/markdown.test.ts ui/src/ui/sidebar-content.ts ui/src/ui/types.ts ui/src/ui/views/markdown-sidebar.ts src/gateway/method-scopes.test.ts src/gateway/methods/core-descriptors.ts src/gateway/server-methods.ts src/gateway/server-methods/sessions-files.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/sessions-files.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/index.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/schema/protocol-schemas.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/schema/sessions.ts packages/gateway-protocol/src/schema/types.ts scripts/protocol-gen-swift.ts`
- `env OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json ui/src/ui/app-render.ts scripts/protocol-gen-swift.ts`
- `pnpm test src/gateway/method-scopes.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/sessions-files.test.ts ui/src/ui/markdown.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`
- `pnpm test ui/src/ui/app-render.assistant-avatar.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render.exec-policy.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render.dreaming.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `codex review --base origin/main`
- `git diff --check origin/main`

### Broad Proof

- `env PATH="/opt/homebrew/Cellar/node@22/22.22.0/bin:$PATH" OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed` passed locally after rebasing, at `368744a344`.
- GitHub CI is rerunning for rebased head `368744a344`.

### Remaining Local Tooling Note

- Direct local Crabbox wrapper proof still needs local Homebrew trust for `openclaw/tap/crabbox`; I did not change global Homebrew trust policy from this PR lane.
